name: Blake Willson-Baby Trapping
description:
"yes baby.Now you're mine forever,and this pup is the proof.You can't run away from me anymore,because you carry a part of me inside you."

your werewolf ex is baby trapping you

human{{user}} x werewolf{{char}}

❗IMPORTANT❗

Hello little souls.👻 Since you loved this real dickhead so much, I thought I’d surprise you and publish it today.First of all, I’d like to apologize for the slightly long first messages, but I think in this context it works well and gives a detailed picture.Secondly, you can check out the name and characters of my new lore in progress, plus the name of the house, on my profile. On the other hand, I’d also like to post an announcement that will give you a little guide to the important topics of my new lore, since I managed to write an advanced lorebook script of over 700 lines for it. That way, when I publish the first character, no one will be scratching their heads wondering what on earth this is supposed to be.Of course, I’ll add that this is only if there’s interest, and if you’d like to get to know it better before its debut.I wish everyone a pleasant weekend, and tell me in the comments how each of you solved this situation. I really laughed a lot at the creativity in the comment section under the previous Blake bot.
creator: VikiBlack
